if(STATE.current=passmark; const m=Math.floor(STATE.timeUsed/60),s=STATE.timeUsed%60; if(!STATE.isFinalExam&&STATE.currentTopic){ STATE.progress[STATE.currentTopic.id]={score:STATE.score/total,passed}; saveState(); } showScreen('resultScreen'); document.getElementById('rStatusLabel').textContent=passed?`✅ PASSED — OBJECTIVE ${STATE.currentTopic?.obj||'FINAL EXAM'}`:`❌ FAILED — ${passmark}% REQUIRED`; document.getElementById('rStatusLabel').style.color=passed?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'; document.getElementById('rPct').textContent=pct+'%'; document.getElementById('rPct').className=`result-pct ${passed?'pass':'fail'}`; document.getElementById('rVerdict').innerHTML=passed ?`You passed ${STATE.currentTopic?.label||'the Final Exam'}! ${STATE.isFinalExam?'Excellent performance!':pct>=90?'Outstanding!':'Review the questions you missed.'}` :`You need ${passmark}% to ${STATE.isFinalExam?'pass the exam':'unlock the next topic'}. You scored ${pct}%. Review the explanations and try again.`; document.getElementById('rcCorrect').textContent=STATE.score; document.getElementById('rcWrong').textContent=total-STATE.score; document.getElementById('rcTotal').textContent=total; document.getElementById('rcTime').textContent=`${m}m ${s}s`; document.getElementById('rBarPct').textContent=pct+'%'; const bar=document.getElementById('rBarFill'); setTimeout(()=>{bar.style.width=pct+'%';bar.className=`pass-bar-fill ${passed?'pass':'fail'}`;},300); const notice=document.getElementById('rNotice'); if(passed&&!STATE.isFinalExam){ const nextIdx=TOPICS.findIndex(t=>t.id===STATE.currentTopic.id)+1; notice.innerHTML=`
🔓 ${nextIdxObjective ${TOPICS[nextIdx].obj} — ${TOPICS[nextIdx].label} is now unlocked!`:'🎓 All objectives passed! The Final Exam is now unlocked!'}
`; } else if(!passed){ notice.innerHTML=`
📚 Review the explanations below, then retry. You need ${passmark-pct}% more to ${STATE.isFinalExam?'pass':'unlock the next topic'}.
`; } else {notice.innerHTML='';} const actions=document.getElementById('rActions'); actions.innerHTML=''; const retryBtn=document.createElement('button'); retryBtn.className='btn-action btn-retry';retryBtn.textContent='↺ RETRY'; retryBtn.onclick=()=>{STATE.isFinalExam?startFinalExam():startTopic(STATE.currentTopic.id)}; actions.appendChild(retryBtn); const dashBtn=document.createElement('button'); dashBtn.className='btn-action btn-dash';dashBtn.textContent='⬅ DASHBOARD'; dashBtn.onclick=()=>{renderDashboard();showScreen('dashScreen')}; actions.appendChild(dashBtn); if(passed&&!STATE.isFinalExam){ const nextIdx=TOPICS.findIndex(t=>t.id===STATE.currentTopic.id)+1; if(nextIdxstartTopic(TOPICS[nextIdx].id); actions.appendChild(nextBtn); } else { const examBtn=document.createElement('button'); examBtn.className='btn-action btn-next-topic'; examBtn.textContent='🎓 GO TO FINAL EXAM →'; examBtn.onclick=()=>{renderDashboard();showScreen('dashScreen')}; actions.appendChild(examBtn); } } const rl=document.getElementById('reviewList');rl.innerHTML=''; STATE.questions.forEach((q,i)=>{ const ua=STATE.userAnswers[i]; const correct=ua&&ua.isCorrect; const div=document.createElement('div'); div.className=`review-q ${correct?'rq-correct':'rq-wrong'}`; const shortQ=q.q.length>100?q.q.substring(0,100)+'…':q.q; div.innerHTML=`
${i+1}. ${shortQ}
${correct?'✓ CORRECT':'✗ WRONG'}
Your answer: ${ua?ua.selected:'—'}  |  Correct: ${q.a}
${q.e}
`; div.addEventListener('click',()=>document.getElementById(`rd${i}`).classList.toggle('open')); rl.appendChild(div); }); document.getElementById('quizProgressFill').style.width='100%'; } function showScreen(id){ document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active')); document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active'); window.scrollTo(0,0); } // ── INIT ── (async function init() { const sess = SP_SESSION.get(); if (!sess || !sess.email) { window.location.href = 'secplus_login.html'; return; } document.getElementById('userChip').textContent = sess.name.toUpperCase(); initSecplusFirebase(); loadState(); renderDashboard(); await loadStateFromFirebase(); renderDashboard(); })(); function saveState() { try { localStorage.setItem('sp_state_v2', JSON.stringify(STATE.progress)); } catch(e) {} const sess = SP_SESSION.get(); if (sess && sess.email) saveProgress(sess.email, STATE.progress).catch(()=>{}); } function loadState() { try { const d=localStorage.getItem('sp_state_v2'); if(d){const p=JSON.parse(d);Object.keys(p).forEach(k=>{if(STATE.progress[k])STATE.progress[k]=p[k]});} } catch(e) {} } async function loadStateFromFirebase() { const sess = SP_SESSION.get(); if (!sess || !sess.email) return; const p = await loadProgress(sess.email); if (p) { Object.keys(p).forEach(k=>{if(STATE.progress[k])STATE.progress[k]=p[k];}); try{localStorage.setItem('sp_state_v2',JSON.stringify(STATE.progress));}catch(e){} } } function doSignOut() { SP_SESSION.clear(); window.location.href = 'secplus_login.html'; }
